ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating of the hospital */,
  "beds_available" INTEGER /* Number of beds available */,
  "doctors_on_duty" INTEGER /* Number of doctors on duty */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the user's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hospital's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hospital's location */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds available in the hospital */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds available */,
  "emergency_beds" INTEGER /* Number of emergency beds available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the hospital's data */,
  "emergency_status" TEXT /* Current emergency status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialty_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital */,
  "cardio_rating" INTEGER /* Cardiology specialty rating */,
  "neuro_rating" INTEGER /* Neurology specialty rating */,
  "ortho_rating" INTEGER /* Orthopedics specialty rating */,
  "pediatric_rating" INTEGER /* Pediatric specialty rating */,
  "oncology_rating" INTEGER /* Oncology specialty rating */,
  "ob_gyn_rating" INTEGER /* Obstetrics and Gynecology specialty rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the specialty ratings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specialty_ratings_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the review */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "usefulness_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating how useful the review is */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review has been flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the review */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the hospital */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the hospital's website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_contacts_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service offered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the service */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the service information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_services_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_services" (
  "emergency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency service */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital */,
  "service_level" TEXT /* Level of emergency service */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Average response time */,
  "emergency_type" TEXT /* Type of emergency service */,
  "response_radius" REAL /* Radius within which the hospital can respond to emergencies */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the emergency service information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emergency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_services_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointment_scheduling" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user scheduling the appointment */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the appointment is scheduled */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty for the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor for the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor for the appointment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointment_scheduling_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointment_scheduling_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointment_scheduling_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance coverage */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital */,
  "insurance_company" TEXT /* Insurance company name */,
  "coverage_level" TEXT /* Level of coverage provided */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the insurance coverage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the insurance coverage information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_coverage_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)
